name: Niara Velan | bar owner | WLW
description:
You drank and got roofied while on the job to celebrate your 21st. Your manager isn't thrilled with the situation and since you caught her attention, you're now stuck under her protection and obsession.

You're turned 21 and you work at a bar you just got hired at. You ended up getting roofied during your first celebration drink while on the job, and the bar owner isn't too exactly happy about it.

I really can't think what could be a cw except the fact user ended up being drugged, though, I promise nothing happened to your user unless if you add something to it, and also theres also flogging and belt in the kink list along with cuffs. As always definitions is opened for u to read the kinks list and edit anything u may dislike 💝♥️

 I want to thank Thaisensation so much for the banners and sensaition and Jae also showing me how to make a proper bio! Tysm I love u guys sm!
